name: RPlog_Trust_a_Dishonest_Man
title: Trust a Dishonest Man: Two Captains on Corellia
summary: In a Corellian spaceport, Captain Arissa Kiiko is cursing over repairs to her Corvette, the Kolier, when she kicks a wayward hydrospanner across the deck and into the path of the flamboyant, rum-scented pirate Captain Jalek Helion. The two trade flirtatious, fencing banter laced with mutual suspicion, each probing the other's trade, crew, and the 'extras' the Kolier offers for a price. Jalek--who claims a legendary reputation but admits his ship's name and class change with the winds--proposes a game of sabacc with their vessels as stakes, but Arissa deftly declines, claiming she's no card player. Recognizing the charming rogue as trouble, she bows out gracefully with a promise that he owes her a drink, retreats up her ship's ramp, and seals it behind her, certain their paths will cross again.
